title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at CREDAI

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at CREDAI
jsonLd.description:
CREDAI, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CREDAI:
CREDAI is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CREDAI!
